title: viola canina var. billotii
intro: Viola canina var. billotii, also known as the dog violet, is a flowering plant that belongs to the violet family and is native to Europe. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Viola canina var. billotii include its ability to soothe digestive problems, alleviate menstrual cramps, and provide relief from respiratory issues, such as colds and coughs. Herbal preparations of Viola canina var. billotii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used internally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
